ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Merge Request Approved
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

I have looked into Ticket #12345 regarding the timeout issue on the payment gateway. After reviewing the logs, I found that the root cause was a missing null check in the PaymentService.java file. I have added the necessary check and committed the changes (commit ID: a1b2c3d4). The corresponding PR has been merged into the main branch (PR #6789). Please verify the changes in the staging environment.

Let me know if there are any further issues.

Thanks,
Anjali

spam.subject: Important: Immediate Action Required – Account Security Alert
spam.body:
Dear User,

Hope you are doing well. This is the IT Helpdesk team from XYZ Company. We have detected an unauthorized login attempt on your account (Ticket #IT-987654). For security reasons, we need you to verify your credentials immediately. Please click on the link below and follow the instructions to reset your password:

<URL>

If you do not reset your password within 24 hours, your account will be permanently disabled.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
IT Helpdesk Support
